diagrams.title: Test-and-Set Lock Acquisition Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing TSL instruction atomically reading lock, writing 1, and deciding whether to enter critical section based on old value
elements: Enter Critical Section or Retry loop

diagrams.title: Swap Algorithm Mutual Exclusion
diagrams.description: Diagram showing two processes attempting atomic swap between their register (containing 1) and shared lock (containing 0)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize atomic exchange for mutual exclusion

diagrams.title: Compare-And-Swap Operation Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing CAS comparing expected value with memory location, conditionally updating based on match

diagrams.title: Load-Linked Store-Conditional Sequence
diagrams.description: Diagram showing LL marking a location and SC succeeding or failing based on whether intervening modification occurred
elements: Success if unchanged, Failure if modified
diagrams.purpose: Understand atomic read-modify-write using linked operations
